cities.name: Moss Lantern Shrine
cities.description: A hillside shrine wrapped in velvet moss, where stone lanterns glow faintly through cedar mist and the air smells of wet bark and green tea.

cities.name: Dew Terrace
cities.description: Layered tea fields catch the first light of morning; narrow stone steps wind between rows while distant farmhouses trail thin threads of woodsmoke.

cities.name: Cedar Pass
cities.description: An ancient forest footpath beneath towering cedars — dappled sunlight, soft needle carpet, and the distant sound of a stream you cannot yet see.

cities.name: Morning Pier
cities.description: A weathered wooden pier stretches into calm inlet water; fishing boats rest at anchor while gulls circle and the horizon blushes pink before sunrise.

cities.name: Tidal Rock Garden
cities.description: Smooth stones and raked sand patterns emerge between tide pools at low water — herons stand still as mirrors, and the sea breathes in slow rhythm.

cities.name: Lantern Bay
cities.description: Paper lanterns line a sheltered bay at twilight; their reflections tremble on dark water while a small village glows warmly along the shore.

cities.name: Harvest Hill
cities.description: Golden orchards crown a gentle hill at late afternoon; ladders lean against laden branches and long shadows stripe the grass like woven tatami.

cities.name: Festival Lantern Lane
cities.description: A narrow village lane hung with paper lanterns and festival banners; food stalls steam in the amber air while children chase sparklers at the lane's end.

cities.name: Onsen Valley Outlook
cities.description: A wooden veranda overlooks a misty valley where hot spring steam rises between autumn trees — the sky burns copper and the world feels unhurried.

cities.name: Windmill Ridge
cities.description: Old windmills turn slowly along a highland ridge; wildflowers bend in steady breeze while cloud shadows drift across sunlit pasture below.

cities.name: Cloud Pasture
cities.description: Sheep graze on a meadow so high the clouds seem within reach; a lonely fence line curves toward a distant peak wrapped in soft violet haze.

cities.name: Wind Chime Summit
cities.description: A mountain shrine strung with glass wind chimes — every gust sends a chorus of clear notes across open sky and terraced steps below.
